groups.text: It is currently 15 degrees and mostly clear in Berlin-Tempelhof.
With the morning weather set, here is the news.

In the realm of artificial intelligence and robotics, NVIDIA is pushing the boundaries of physical AI. NVIDIA has introduced new tools and frameworks to accelerate the development of autonomous machines, focusing on the integration of generative AI with robotics. This shift aims to move beyond traditional programming, allowing robots to learn and adapt through simulation and real-world interaction, potentially revolutionizing industries from manufacturing to healthcare.

Meanwhile, the geopolitical landscape remains volatile. In the Middle East, diplomatic efforts continue as nations seek a sustainable ceasefire and a path toward long-term stability. These negotiations are complicated by internal political pressures and the strategic interests of global powers, highlighting the fragile nature of peace in the region.

In the financial sector, market volatility persists as investors react to shifting interest rate expectations and economic data. Central banks are carefully balancing the need to curb inflation without triggering a recession, leading to a cautious approach in monetary policy that continues to influence global equity and bond markets.
After the headlines, back to the weather.
This afternoon will be cloudy with rain chances up to 30 percent and temperatures between 21 and 23 degrees.
And from the weather, a quick look at the calendar.

On your calendar today: personal calendar: all day: Department Retro, Fronleichnam at BY, BW, HE, NW, RP, SL, and Fronleichnam at HE, BW, BY, NW, RP, SL, at 13:00, Open Office - Platform Team at Momentum office couch area, at 14:00, Meeting Aaron, at 16:00, AutoML Seminar, and at 19:00, ️ Greifen and ️ Greifen.
And that's it for your personal morning broadcast.
